from dsl import *

    x1 = leastcolor(I)
    x2 = vmirror(I)
    x3 = objects(I, T, T, T)
    x4 = merge(x3)
    x5 = mostcolor(x4)
    x6 = cellwise(I, x2, x1)
    x7 = hmirror(x6)
